visual_description: The man in a light shirt and dark trousers adjusts a decomposing corpse lying on a black gurney, while a man in a dark suit stands behind the table observing. A man in a white shirt and tie stands to the left near a cabinet, and a woman in a maroon top and dark pants enters from the right to also handle the body. The room has green walls, a wooden door, and a white coat hanging on a hook.
